nodes.title: README
widgets_values:
### 📌 MODES & BEHAVIOR

*   **TXT2IMG**
    *   Image references are ignored.
    *   Processing time is wasted on conditioning and resizing that does not affect the result.

*   **IMG2IMG**
    *   **Image 1** is the main input (references are ignored).
    *   This is the **only mode** where you need to adjust the denoise value.

*   **Edit Mode**
    *   **Image 1** usually acts as the base, though the prompt determines the influence.
    *   If the aspect ratio is kept, Image 1 will use the resolution set in *Resolution master*.
    *   ✅ Tested References: All five worked perfectly.
    *   ⚠️ Reference Limit: The 6th reference adds degradation and slows generation without effect. 
    *   *Tip:* Each additional reference increases generation time and reduces quality (degradation).

*   **Inpaint**
    *   **With Reference (True):** Acts as Edit Mode with a mask. Highly stable, preserves original image structure.
        *   ✅ **Requirement:** Set Denoise strictly to **1.0** in Ksampler.

    *   **Without Reference (False):** Prioritizes prompt over image data for sharper edits and changes.
        *   ⚠️ **Warning:** Consistency drops significantly; requires high mask precision. Recommended Denoise: **0.65 – 0.8**.


*   **Outpaint**
    *   ⚠️ Note this is not a one-step tool; additional inpainting steps may be required depending on the expansion area. Expanding more than 1.5x original size may break consistency.
        *   ✅ **Toggle True (Target Size)**: Set final resolution in Resolution master.
        *   ⚠️ Toggle False (Pad & Mask): Expand mask individually per side for better control.
    *  *Stability Tip:* Often requires additional inpaint refinement (Denoise ~0.6, No Reference) to match the generated image style.


### 🛠️ OTHER FEATURES

*   **Adetailer**: Most useful for fixing generations of LORA models (characters/people).
*   **Florence-2 Caption**: Uses **Image 1** as the source for captioning.
*   **Controlnet**: 
    *   **Note:** It is not technically "ControlNet"; it acts simply as another reference in *Edit Mode*.
    *   You cannot control its influence power, but it still works effectively.
*   **Metadata**: shows the embedded data in loaded images.  Select the node and then click *Execute to Selected Output Nodes* from the pop-up menu. Displays embedded data/parameters (if available). 
    *   ✅ Works well with PNG/JPG, 
    *   ⚠️ WEBP support is limited and may show formatting "garbage"
    * 💡 Tip: Use **“Metadata Raw”** instead of “Metadata Clean” to view all readable data from the image.
*   **Bookmarks**: Adjusted for my 2K (16:9) monitor setup. ⚠️ You will likely need to manually adjust them if using a different resolution or aspect ratio.
~~~ 
@DemonAlone
~~~

nodes.title: Links
widgets_values:
### 🔗 REQUIRED & OPTIONAL EXTENSIONS

*   **Links:** My own extensions are hosted on GitHub and available via **ComfyUI Manager**.
*   **Requiring Extensions:**
    *   [Main extension](https://github.com/DemonAlone/DemonAlone-nodes-ComfyUI)
    *   [Style Selector](https://github.com/DemonAlone/DemonAlone-StyleSelector-ComfyUI).
*   **Optional:**
    *   [Local miniPaint with integration](https://github.com/DemonAlone/DemonAlone-miniPaint-ComfyUI)
